name: Military Conflict: Vietnam
short_description: It’s 1968 in Vietnam, the time to “Make War Not Love”. Side with the Viet Cong or U.S. Army in this intense, fast-paced FPS set in the Vietnam War — now with co-op zombie mode. Choose from 300+ weapons of destruction. Kill or be killed!
detailed_description:
It’s 1968 in Vietnam, the time to “Make War Not Love”. Side with the Viet Cong or U.S. Army in this intense, fast-paced FPS set during the Vietnam War. Experience classic combat or jump into co-op zombie mode. Choose from 300+ weapons of destruction. Kill or be killed!

Features:

• Various game modes
• 20 historical battlefields
• Realistic player customization
• Over 300 weapons

Rainbow Herbicides

Experience the horrors of deforestation chemicals like “Agent Orange” in co-op and single-player action.

Features:

• 6-player online co-op
• 16 unique zombie types
• Construct barricades
• Deployable turrets
• Shop with 300+ weapons

NO MICROTRANSACTIONS. ALL FUTURE CONTENT IS FREE.

EARLY ACCESS – PERFORMANCE, GRAPHICS & CONTENT ARE SUBJECT TO CHANGE.

supported_languages:
English*, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Ukrainian, Polish, Vietnamese, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, German, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, French, Czech, Turkish, Arabic, Korean, Spanish - Latin America
*languages with full audio support
